heading: Cost of inspection; overtime
label: 468 Cost of inspection; overtime
text: The cost of inspection rendered under the requirements of this chapter, shall be borne by the United States, except the cost of overtime and holiday pay paid pursuant to the .1section 2219a of title 7So in original. The word “the” probably should not appear.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “section 10703 of the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002”, meaning , which enacted , Agriculture, amended this section, , and , Government Organization and Employees, and repealed .Section 2219a of title 7section 10703 of Pub. L. 107–171section 2219a of Title 7section 695 of this titlesection 5549 of Title 5section 394 of Title 7

Amendments2002— substituted “except the cost of overtime and holiday pay paid pursuant to the .” for “except that the cost of overtime and holiday work performed in establishments subject to the provisions of this chapter at such rates as the Secretary may determine shall be borne by such establishments. Sums received by the Secretary in reimbursement for sums paid out by him for such premium pay work shall be available without fiscal year limitation to carry out the purposes of this section.”Pub. L. 107–171section 2219a of title 7
